headline: 3 Reasons We’re Fans of Cintas (CTAS)
summary: Over the last six months, Cintas’s shares have sunk to $174.07, producing a disappointing 7.4% loss - a stark contrast to the S&P 500’s 3.5% gain. This may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.
